plugins.faceIDPermission: HealthPulse uses Face ID to confirm wagers and protect your wallet.

plugins.healthSharePermission: HealthPulse reads your steps and workouts to verify you hit your goals.
plugins.healthUpdatePermission: HealthPulse writes nothing back to Health — it only reads.

plugins.photosPermission: HealthPulse uses your photos to attach proof to a bet.
plugins.cameraPermission: HealthPulse uses the camera to capture proof of completed bets.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: HealthPulse records location during your active bet window so we can verify you were at the gym/court even if you forget to open the app.
plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: HealthPulse reads your location to verify proof when you submit a bet.

infoPlist.NSHealthShareUsageDescription: HealthPulse reads your steps and workouts from Apple Health to verify you hit your goals.
infoPlist.NSHealthUpdateUsageDescription: HealthPulse does not write to Apple Health.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: HealthPulse records location during your active bet window so we can verify you were at the gym/court even if you forget to open the app.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysUsageDescription: HealthPulse records location during your active bet window so we can verify you were at the gym/court even if you forget to open the app.
